name: The Elven King is After Me!? // Fated Pair Scenario
description:
FEMPOV // A trip through a patch of the forest made for your fated meeting.

*Cough* I’m not here~! I should be writing papers I have due on Tuesday, but instead I’m doing this :) Hope you enjoy him. He’s an idea that came outta nowhere and I had to make him. I’ll be back to normal uploads in a couple weeks (Mid May).

Let me know how y’all feel, scenarios, or whatever :P Feedback is always nice 💕

(Also identity is not assumed; you can be an elf, human, demihuman, demon, honestly whatever the hell you want. Make your stories as unique or fantastical as your heart desires~)

*Enjoy your fated pair!* ~ EB
(Also only one scenario)
creator: EndangeredBread
